I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mental_health for LifeFirst, property_protection.home_content for PrimeHome Premium Coverage, and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance for PrimeTravel Premium Plan.
